meta.title: Japan Trip 2027
meta.note: Draft itinerary — Kyoto → Tokyo Marathon → Niseko → Sapporo. The 14–20 Mar block is a placeholder; fill in once decided.

days.title: Depart for Japan
days.detail: Long-haul out — arrive the next day depending on route (via Osaka/Kansai or direct to Tokyo).

legs.name: Kyoto
legs.blurb: A few days of temples, food and jet-lag walks before the taper kicks in.

days.title: Arrive & settle
days.detail: Land, transfer to Kyoto, check in. Easy walking only — race is 7 days out.

days.title: Kyoto sightseeing
days.detail: Fushimi Inari, Gion, Kiyomizu-dera.

days.title: Kyoto sightseeing
days.detail: Arashiyama bamboo grove, Kinkaku-ji, Nishiki Market.

days.title: Kyoto free day
days.detail: Nara day-trip (deer park) or a slow Kyoto day — keep it easy, no big hikes this close to race day.

days.title: Kyoto → Tokyo
days.detail: Shinkansen to Tokyo, check in, easy shakeout jog to loosen up after travel.

days.title: Expo & bib pickup
days.detail: Collect race kit, light sightseeing (Shibuya/Harajuku), carb-load begins.

days.title: Shakeout & rest
days.detail: Short shakeout + strides, full carb-load, lay out race kit, early night.

days.title: 🏁 TOKYO MARATHON
days.detail: Race day. Then eat, drink (in moderation) and celebrate.

legs.name: Tokyo recovery
legs.blurb: One full day off your feet before the next leg.

days.title: Recovery day
days.detail: Legs up, short walk only, onsen/massage if you can find one, eat properly.

days.title: Tokyo → Niseko
days.detail: Fly Haneda/Narita → New Chitose, ~2.5h transfer bus to Niseko. Gear rental, easy first runs if there's time.

legs.name: Niseko — snowboarding
legs.blurb: A few days on the mountain.

days.title: Snowboarding
days.detail: Full day on the mountain.

days.title: Snowboarding
days.detail: Full day on the mountain.

days.title: Snowboarding
days.detail: Last day riding.

legs.name: Sapporo
legs.blurb: A day in the city on the way through.

days.title: Niseko → Sapporo
days.detail: Transfer to Sapporo. Clock Tower, Odori Park, Nijo Market, ramen alley.

legs.name: Tourist stuff — TBD
legs.blurb: Placeholder days — fill these in once the group decides (Otaru, Hakone, Nikko, back to Tokyo, etc.).

days.title: Flexible
days.detail: TBD — Otaru day-trip (canal, glassblowing) or more Sapporo.

days.title: Flexible
days.detail: TBD — head back toward Tokyo, or more Hokkaido.

days.title: Flexible
days.detail: TBD — Hakone or Nikko day-trip from Tokyo.

days.title: Flexible
days.detail: TBD — Tokyo neighbourhoods: Asakusa, Akihabara, Odaiba.

days.title: Flexible
days.detail: TBD — free day / shopping / onsen.

days.title: Flexible
days.detail: TBD — free day.

days.title: Pack up
days.detail: Last-minute shopping, final dinner.

days.title: Fly home
days.detail: Depart Japan.
